dollarNews.title: Indonesia set to issue US$1 billion in panda bonds in China to stabilise finances as rupiah falls (SCMP, Jun 26)
dollarNews.summary: Indonesia plans US$1B panda bonds in China as rupiah depreciates. More nations turning to yuan-denominated debt.

dollarNews.title: Hong Kong vows stronger exchange with reforms, bond futures and gold push (SCMP, Jun 27)
dollarNews.summary: HK exchange targets growth with bond futures and gold initiatives. Part of efforts to strengthen HK's financial hub status amid dollar dynamics.

dollarNews.title: EU pitches Brazil a more beneficial rare earths deal than US or China, promising refining investment and tech transfer (SCMP, Jun 26)
dollarNews.summary: Competition for strategic minerals reshaping trade alliances. EU competes with US and China for Brazilian rare earths.

reNews.title: Hong Kong prime office vacancy hits 7-month low on Central spillover demand (SCMP, Jun 25)
reNews.summary: HK prime office vacancy rate fell to a 7-month low as demand spills over from Central to other districts. Positive sign for Grade A office recovery.

reNews.title: Mainland Chinese mining boss snaps up HK home at US$28m receivership sale (SCMP, Jun 24)
reNews.summary: Distressed Stanley property sold at steep discount as banks push to clear losses. Mainland investors returning to HK luxury market.

reNews.title: HK banks force sales of distressed commercial property to control losses (SCMP, Jun 22)
reNews.summary: Banks prioritising loss control over loan extensions, forcing owners to sell assets or restructure debt. Commercial property remains under pressure.

reNews.title: Xtep opens first Saucony store in Hong Kong, eyes more premium retail sites (SCMP, Jun 26)
reNews.summary: Chinese sportswear group positions premium running brand in HK. Improving market sentiment drawing retailers back to prime sites.

reNews.title: Creditors push to sell 2 HK hotels amid banks drive to cut losses (SCMP, Jun 24)
reNews.summary: Dual-branded Sheraton complex heads for tender. Stricter capital rules pushing lenders to accept quicker disposals on distressed hotel assets.

reNews.title: Wan Chai / Causeway Bay Grade A office net absorption hits 2-year high in May (HKEJ, Jun 24)
reNews.summary: JLL Hong Kong Property Market Monitor reports May net absorption in Wan Chai/Causeway Bay Grade A offices surpassed 2-year record.

reNews.title: Taipan Bread founder family sells San Po Kong industrial unit for HK$19.5M (HKEJ, Jun 17)
reNews.summary: Notable industrial property sale in San Po Kong district, reflecting mixed sentiment in the industrial segment.

reNews.title: apm Kwun Tong expects 10% foot traffic increase during World Cup (HKEJ, Jun 11)
reNews.summary: SHK Properties' apm mall in Kwun Tong installing 6m x 3.5m LED screen for live World Cup broadcasts, expects foot traffic boost.

reNews.title: Causeway Bay mini shop sells for HK$58,000, down over 96% from peak (HKEJ, Jun 10)
reNews.summary: Stratified retail space in Causeway Bay Plaza sold at 96%+ loss from peak, illustrating severe retail property correction.

stockNews.summary: China's massive AI infrastructure plan positions telecom giants like China Mobile as key beneficiaries from data center buildout.

stockNews.title: [0005.HK] HSBC (LSE:HSBA) Weighs Allianz Sale of Singapore Insurance Business
stockNews.summary: HSBC evaluating sale of Singapore insurance operations to Allianz. Part of ongoing portfolio rationalization.

stockNews.title: [0939.HK] Should Value Investors Buy China Construction Bank Stock?
stockNews.summary: CCB continues to attract value investors amid attractive dividend yields and stable earnings from big 4 state banks.

stockNews.title: [0728.HK] China Telecom At Heart Of HK$295b Data Center Expansion Story
stockNews.summary: China Telecom positioned as core player in HK$295 billion data center investment theme, leveraging network infrastructure advantage.

stockNews.summary: Pentagon list expansion may indirectly impact China Unicom given sector-wide sentiment on US-China tech tensions.

stockNews.summary: CNOOC benefiting from elevated oil prices. Q1 profit of 39.14B yuan reflects strong upstream performance.

stockNews.title: [0857.HK] Woodside Denies Exxon Deal Talks Amid Takeover Speculation
stockNews.summary: PetroChina-related industry news: Woodside denies M&A talks with Exxon. Energy sector consolidation watch continues.

stockNews.summary: ICBC among major Chinese banks curbing retail gold trading amid heightened volatility in precious metal markets.

stockNews.summary: BOC also participating in restriction of retail gold trading. Gold rally prompting risk management measures across state banks.
